creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #3)

I disagree with you in configure script Gtk2 is optional. I know Gtk2 support is required by some others applications, that's why it is set by default. 

Users which change default option, they known what they are doing. Usually in Xfce ports default options are safe for end users.

By the way commit what seems best to you.
